steps.expected: Homepage loads with bottom tab bar visible
steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully with bottom tab bar (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) visible at the bottom

steps.action: Tap the search bar ('Find products') to open search overlay
steps.expected: Search overlay opens covering full viewport
steps.observed: Search overlay opened covering full viewport with trending items displayed

steps.action: Verify overlay covers full viewport and tab bar is hidden
steps.expected: Overlay has z-index > 50 (tab bar), position fixed, inset 0. Bottom tab bar is not visible.
steps.observed: Overlay has z-index: 60, position: fixed, top: 0px, bottom: 0px, left: 0px, right: 0px. Bottom tab bar is completely hidden behind the overlay.
Body overflow is 'hidden', preventing page body scroll while overlay is open

VAL-SEARCH-010.notes: The z-index fix is confirmed working. The search overlay uses z-index: 60 (z-[60]) which renders above the bottom tab bar's z-index: 50 (z-50). The overlay covers the full viewport with position: fixed and inset: 0. Body scroll is properly locked with overflow: hidden. The bottom tab bar is completely hidden behind the overlay. No console errors observed.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-SEARCH-010 z-index fix confirmed — search overlay (z-index: 60) properly renders above bottom tab bar (z-index: 50), covering the full viewport at 375x812.
